zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas De More於1360年出生在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特時，他的父親John Muir De More of Norwich35歲，母親Matilda Falkinden40歲。他和Catherine Benenden至少有5個兒子。他去世於1424年在英國史洛普爾莫爾享年64歲，埋葬在英國肯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas De More于1360年出生在英国藍卡爾曼徹斯特时，他的父亲John Muir De More of Norwich35岁，母亲Matilda Falkinden40岁。他和Catherine Benenden至少有5个儿子。他去世于1424年在英国史洛普爾莫爾享年64岁，埋葬在英国肯特。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: More
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician and Portuguese: habitational name from any of the places called Moure, from the Latin personal name Maurus.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas De More was born in 1360, in Manchester, Lancashire, England, his father, John Muir De More of Norwich, was 35 and his mother, Matilda Falkinden, was 40. He had at least 5 sons with Catherine Benenden. He died in 1424, in More, Shropshire, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas De More est né en 1360, à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, John Muir De More of Norwich, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Matilda Falkinden, avait 40 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils avec Catherine Benenden. Il est décédé en 1424, à More, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas De More 1360 in Manchester, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Muir De More of Norwich 35 und seine Mutter Matilda Falkinden 40. Er hatte mit Catherine Benenden mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1424 im Alter von 64 Jahren in More, Shropshire, England und wurde in Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas De More è nato il nel 1360 nel Manchester, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, John Muir De More of Norwich, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Matilda Falkinden, aveva 40 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli con Catherine Benenden. Morì nel 1424, nel More, Shropshire, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas De Moreが1360年にイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターで生まれた時，父John Muir De More of Norwichは35歳，母Matilda Falkindenは40歳であった。彼はCatherine Benendenとの間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。彼は1424年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーで64歳で死去し，イギリスケントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas De More(이)가 1360년 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Muir De More of Norwich(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Falkinden(은)는 40세였다. 그는 Catherine Benenden(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1424년 영국 슈럽실르 모어에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas De More nasceu em 1360, em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Muir De More of Norwich, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Falkinden, tinha 40 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos com Catherine Benenden. Ele faleceu em 1424, em More, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas De More родился в 1360 г. в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Muir De More of Norwich было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Falkinden, 40. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от Catherine Benenden. Он умер в 1424 г. в местности мор, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas De More nació en 1360, en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Muir De More of Norwich, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Matilda Falkinden, tenía 40 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos con Catherine Benenden. Murió en 1424, en More, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Kent, Inglaterra.
